name: Devil Fruit: Inu Inu no Mi (Model: Wolf)

description.value:
Archetype Artifact â€” Devil Fruit (Zoan)

A dark, shaggy-furred fruit with a spiral pattern resembling a wolf's eye. Consuming the Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Wolf permanently binds wolf nature to your soul, granting the Wolf-Human archetype and the ability to transform between three forms.

Three Forms

  • Human Form â€” Your base form. You retain your normal statistics plus the passive benefits of the dedication feat.
  • Hybrid Form (unlocked at level 4) â€” A wolf-human hybrid: +10 Speed, enhanced Athletics and Perception, powerful bite and claw attacks. Apply the Wolf: Hybrid Form effect from the Devil Fruit Effects compendium.
  • Full Wolf Form (unlocked at level 8) â€” A massive wolf: Speed 40+, Large size, dire bite attacks, imprecise scent. Apply the Wolf: Full Beast Form effect. Cannot use hands or speak in this form.

Wolf-Human Archetype Progression

Upon consuming this fruit, you immediately gain the Wolf-Human Dedication feat. Additional archetype feats are automatically unlocked as you level up:

  • Level 4: Hybrid Form â€” Partial transformation into wolf-human hybrid
  • Level 6: Savage Howl â€” 60-foot fear howl, Will save
  • Level 8: Full Wolf Form â€” Complete wolf transformation
  • Level 10: Pack Tactics â€” Attack bonus when allies threaten the same target
  • Level 12: Predator's Rush â€” Stride + Strike with free Trip attempt
  • Level 14: Howl of Dread â€” 120-foot legendary howl, requires wolf form
  • Level 16: Alpha's Presence â€” Will penalty aura; bonus damage vs. Frightened
  • Level 18: Apex Wolf â€” Physical resistance in wolf forms; speed upgrades
  • Level 20: Dire Wolf Aspect â€” Huge dire wolf ultimate form, terror aura

Trait: Sea-Bound. While submerged in standing seawater (at least waist-deep) or in contact with Seastone, you are Slowed 1, Clumsy 1, and cannot use any actions or passives granted by your Devil Fruit archetype. If fully submerged, you are Stunned until removed from the water. Remove any active wolf form effects when Sea-Bound.

A creature may only ever consume one Devil Fruit. Consuming a second is instantly fatal.
description.gm: This Zoan fruit uses the Devil Fruit Effects compendium pack for form tracking. When a player activates Hybrid Form or Full Wolf Form, they drag the appropriate effect from that compendium onto their character. The effects set roll options (wolf-human:hybrid-form / wolf-human:beast-form) that gate Apex Wolf's physical resistance automatically. The GrantItem rules auto-grant progression feats from the Devil Fruit Feats pack using level predicates.
